latest.title: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
latest.summary: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.

latest.title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
latest.summary: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.

radar.title: 'I like their money': Trump threatens lawsuits against ABC for reporting on Reflecting Pool
radar.summary: The latest action against ABC comes as the broadcaster faces two investigations from the Federal Communications Commission.

radar.title: SpaceX stock continues to slide following $400 billion sell-off
radar.summary: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO.

radar.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
radar.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.
